entities.description: The nutrient status and quality of the soil affecting crop growth

entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area

entities.description: A tree species used in sahelian agroforestry to improve soil and yield

entities.name: PILIOSTIGMA RETICULATUM
entities.description: A tree species that results in high millet grain and straw yields

entities.name: NIGER

entities.description: The semi-arid region of Africa where agroforestry parklands are located

entities.name: FERTILIZER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of applying nutrients to the soil to increase crop productivity

entities.name: FERTILIZER MICRODOSING
entities.description: A specific fertilizer management practice involving small, targeted applications

entities.name: DAP

entities.name: NPK
entities.description: A type of mineral fertilizer used in microdosing

entities.name: MANURE

entities.name: STRAW YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the non-edible vegetative parts of the millet crop

entities.name: SOIL QUALITY
entities.description: The overall health and nutrient capacity of the soil
